subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Ja'far! May thou be favored through divine bounties. The True One, exalted be His glory, hath counseled His servants in the Books, the Scriptures and the Psalms [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد جعفر انشاءالله بعنایت الهی فائز باشی حق جل جلاله عباد خود را در کتب و صحف و زبر نصیحت فرمود
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
